title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events. After four years of regulatory battles including litigation against government oversight, the company achieved millions of customers and a $22 billion valuation.
